```python
def solve(criteria):
    # Placeholder for the actual solution mechanism
    # This function should filter and return solution mechanisms based on the provided criteria
    if not criteria:
        return []

    # Example logic to filter solution mechanisms based on criteria
    solution_mechanisms = [
        {"name": "Mechanism A", "type": "Type 1", "difficulty": "Easy"},
        {"name": "Mechanism B", "type": "Type 2", "difficulty": "Medium"},
        {"name": "Mechanism C", "type": "Type 1", "difficulty": "Hard"},
    ]

    filtered_solutions = [
        mechanism for mechanism in solution_mechanisms
        if mechanism["type"] == criteria.get("type") and mechanism["difficulty"] == criteria.get("difficulty")
    ]

    return filtered_solutions
```
